daily_summary.headline: Moderate Aurora Activity and Routine Launches Mark the Day

top_events.title: Aurora Forecast: Moderate Activity
top_events.description: A G1 geomagnetic storm is predicted with a Kp index of 4.67, offering potential aurora visibility at high latitudes.
top_events.action: Check aurora conditions if you're at high latitudes.

top_events.title: Long March 2D Launch
top_events.description: The Long March 2D rocket is scheduled to launch with an unknown payload from China.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream for updates.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Starlink Launch
top_events.description: SpaceX's Falcon 9 will deploy another batch of Starlink satellites.
top_events.action: Tune in to the live stream for coverage.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
